commands.cmd: read-only measurement authorization, query, smoothing, units, axis, privacy and accessibility review

summary: Approved a three-query opt-in weight trend with separately protected target and non-clinical accessible semantics.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit and was interrupted; the PM performed the same review as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: The bounded weight vertical must be delivered and audited.
Card/planner preferences, household analysis, offline/performance documentation and rendered final evidence remain later tasks.
